title: Single question record (one per line in questions/questions.jsonl)

category.description: Which corpus category the question targets, or 'cross_category' for retrieval-across-types questions.

question_type.description: Used for per-type metric breakdown in the paper.

expected_behavior.description: 'refuse' questions have no answer in the corpus; the system should say so.

difficulty.description: Coarse label; used for stratified reporting.

answer_text.description: Reference answer. Empty string for expected_behavior='refuse'.

answer_normalized.description: Optional canonical form for exact-match metric: '2026-07-31' instead of 'July 31, 2026'.

span.description: Exact text span on the page that contains the answer; used for citation-span precision.

answer_type.description: Used by exact-match metric to apply type-aware normalization.

rationale.description: Free-text note from the question author explaining why this question is in the set (e.g. 'tests OCR robustness; answer span sits on noisy page').
